summary: Follow button bug fix verification complete. Backend (11/11 tests pass) and Frontend (all flows working on desktop and mobile). Both reported bugs are FIXED: 1) notification_routes.py now uses 'type' instead of 'notification_type' in query filter (line 107), 2) FollowButton.js completely rewritten - removed hover events, now uses click-based confirm toggle for mobile compatibility.
critical_code_review_comments: FollowButton.js - Line 12-13: justFollowed ref prevents immediate unfollow after follow - good UX for mobile
FollowButton.js - Line 103-114: handleButtonClick uses click-based approach instead of hover (fixes mobile issue)
FollowButton.js - Line 21-34: useEffect properly cleans up event listeners for outside click
notification_routes.py - Line 107: Fixed query to use 'type' field instead of 'notification_type'
profile_routes.py - Line 249: Notification stored with 'type' field correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Follow/Unfollow flows working on desktop and mobile

context_for_next_testing_agent: Follow button fix verified. Key tests: POST /api/profile/follow returns success:true with status:approved for public accounts. GET /api/profile/follow-status/{user_id} returns current status. DELETE /api/profile/unfollow/{user_id} works. Notification filter with notification_type=follow now works (queries 'type' field). Frontend FollowButton shows Follow→Following state change and unfollow popup on click.

backend_api_tests.test_cleanup_existing_follow: PASS - Cleans up any existing follow relationship
backend_api_tests.test_follow_status_not_following: PASS - Returns status:null when not following
backend_api_tests.test_follow_user_success: PASS - POST returns success:true and status:approved
backend_api_tests.test_notifications_filter_by_type: PASS - Filter by notification_type=follow works (fix verified)

frontend_ui_tests.follow_button_shows_follow_state: PASS - Button shows 'Follow' with UserPlus icon
frontend_ui_tests.follow_button_changes_to_following: PASS - After clicking, button shows 'Following' with UserCheck icon
frontend_ui_tests.unfollow_popup_has_correct_buttons: PASS - Shows Unfollow (red) and Cancel buttons
frontend_ui_tests.unfollow_changes_button_back_to_follow: PASS - After unfollow, button returns to 'Follow' state
frontend_ui_tests.mobile_follow_button_works: PASS - Button state changes work on mobile viewport (390x844)

original_issues: Follow button not changing to 'Following' after tap on mobile (hover events issue)
Follow notifications not sent to target user (wrong field name in query)
fixes_verified: FollowButton.js rewritten - removed onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave hover events, uses click-based confirm toggle
notification_routes.py line 107 - changed query['notification_type'] to query['type']
justFollowed ref prevents immediate unfollow after follow for better mobile UX
bug_fix_verification.verification_method: Backend pytest + Frontend Playwright tests on desktop and mobile viewports
